ddls:
CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the branch */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "make" TEXT /* The make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the car was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the car (e.g., AVAILABLE, BOOKED) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the branch where the car is available */,
  "car_type" TEXT /* The type of the car (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* The transmission type of the car (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* The fuel type of the car (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* The mileage of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* The full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_car_type" TEXT /* The customer's preferred car type */,
  "preferred_transmission_type" TEXT /* The customer's preferred transmission type */,
  "preferred_fuel_type" TEXT /* The customer's preferred fuel type */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* The customer's loyalty program status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "book_date" INTEGER /* The date when the booking was made */,
  "end_date" INTEGER /* The date when the booking ends */,
  "price" TEXT /* The price for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the booking (e.g., SUCCESS, PENDING, CANCELLED) */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the car booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "booking_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the booking (in days) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* The discount applied (if any) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* The total amount paid (including taxes and fees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the booking the payment is for */,
  "amount" TEXT /* The amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* The date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment (e.g., CREDIT CARD, DEBIT CARD) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the payment (e.g., SUCCESS, FAILED) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* The payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking history record */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "book_date" INTEGER /* The date when the booking was made */,
  "end_date" INTEGER /* The date when the booking ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the booking */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* The reason for cancellation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing model */,
  "pricing_model" TEXT /* The name of the pricing model */,
  "rate" TEXT /* The rate for the pricing model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the car */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* The name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* The description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the car */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the customer who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* The rating given by the customer */,
  "review" TEXT /* The review made by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* The name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* The description of the loyalty program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* The benefits of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)
